that the acceleration sensor is failed, the failure signal is send to WCM, and WCM sets this code.
The TPMS transmitter detects if the tire pressure sensor is normal and sends the signal to WCM. When the TPMS transmitter judges that the tire
pressure sensor is failed, the failure signal is send to WCM, and WCM sets this code.
The TPMS transmitter detects if the wheel is rotated by the acceleration sensor and sends the signals to KOS-ECU. When the TPMS transmitter
judges that the acceleration sensor is failed, the failure signal is send to KOS-ECU, and KOS-ECU sets this code.
The TPMS transmitter detects if the tire pressure sensor is normal and sends the signal to KOS-ECU. When the TPMS transmitter judges that the
tire pressure sensor is failed, the failure signal is send to KOS-ECU, and KOS-ECU sets this code.
